title: Days Gone
description: A simple day counter in the bottom left of your inventory!
body:
![Mod logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0231f22524433d4e11d08b1be1b2323b0e344480.png)
A Lightweight and Client-Side mod, Days gone simply aims to add a day counter, for accurate and honest tracking of days.
